title: Vimto Candy Floss 20g (Pack of 12)
description: Product Description Our Vimto Candy Floss 20g is light, fluffy and fun. Uniquely packaged in our very own plastic cup, the fruity flavours and secret Vimto recipe create the perfect sweet treat. Suitable for vegetarians and containing no artificial colours or flavours, this is a perfect reward or snack for the kids. Ingredients Sugar, Vimto flavour (including extracts of fruit, herbs and spices), Natural Colours (Anthocyanins, Cochineal) Box Contains Each order comes with 12 x Vimto Candy Floss 20g See more
